pre_mission.speaker: Mirel
pre_mission.line: Questions later. Lift with me now.

pre_mission.speaker: Mirel
pre_mission.line: I watched men in royal colors burn villages from the safe side of the wind. They left one escape route open. Panic corridors.

pre_mission.speaker: Mirel
pre_mission.line: I am certain enough to be angry.

pre_mission.speaker: Lyria
pre_mission.line: Then we stop this where it started.

battle_start.speaker: Mirel
battle_start.line: I will cool the magma channels. Move when I say.

battle_start.speaker: Aric
battle_start.line: Break the gate before the runes re-align.

post_mission.speaker: Lyria
post_mission.line: These patterns are not only defensive. They gather aether inward.

post_mission.speaker: Lyria
post_mission.line: I think we are walking toward the answer.
